title: Better Copper
body:
Better Copper is a mod that adds an actual benefit to Copper Ore, while still keeping a vanilla feel.
This mod adds copper tools (axe, pickaxe, shovel, hoe, sword), as well as an entire line of copper armor, which has been placed just before Iron in terms of durability and protectiveness, with enchantibility on the level of Wood and Leather items.
Every item has a different visual based on it's durability level, as well as full enchantibility. (In Works)
